meta.title: North Cove Studio — Vancouver
meta.description: Independent design studio in East Vancouver. Identity, packaging, and small-run print since 2014.

business.name: North Cove Studio
business.tagline: Identity, packaging, print. Made by hand.

data.headline: Made.
data.subhead: Independent design studio. We work with founders, restaurants, record labels, and a few wineries we like.

items.title: Identity
items.description: Wordmarks, logo systems, brand guidelines. The full kit.

items.title: Packaging
items.description: Bottle labels, food packaging, retail goods. Printed locally.

items.title: Print
items.description: Posters, books, menus, ephemera. Letterpress and digital.

text.headline: We make work that lasts.
text.body: Most projects start with a long conversation. Then a moodboard. Then a single concept we believe in, presented with conviction. We don't do five-direction sprays.

items.author: Eliza T., Founder, Coal Harbour Coffee
items.text: They got it on the first round. The packaging won an ADCC award six months later. We've referred everyone we know.

data.headline: Our process, in a deck.
data.description: How we approach identity work — the questions we ask, our typical timeline, what to expect at each stage.

data.headline: Have a project in mind?
data.subhead: We take on a small number of clients per year. Reach out — we'd like to hear about it.
